scripts.build:all: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix backend run test:unit
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
